heading: Today
text: Periods of sun giving way to increasing clouds.  A rising chance of showers through NY and the St. Lawrence Valley in the afternoon, spreading east through Quebec and into VT late in the day.  Highs in the 70s to a few low 80s.  Light winds, becoming south less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Showers increasing overnight, with a chance of a few thunderstorms.  Lows in the 50s to around 60.  Winds south to southeast 5 to 15 mph, becoming light and variable outside the Champlain Valley.

heading: Friday
text: Morning showers giving way to breaks of sun, especially south.  A good chance of afternoon showers, possibly a thunderstorm, north, scattered south.  Highs in the 70s north, near 80 south.  Winds variable to south up to 10 mph.
